description: Phase 9 Part 2: Add core data models, service logic, and tests for QuantDrive (file CRUD, folders, sharing, versioning, trash, storage quota), QuantCalendar (events, recurring events, availability, booking links), and QuantMeet (rooms, participants, transcript, summary, action items). These apps already have backend structures. Fill in missing core service methods and add tests to meet launch gates.
steps: In apps/quantdrive/backend/services/file.service.ts: ensure uploadFile, downloadFile, getFile, listFiles, moveFile, copyFile, deleteFile exist with proper typing.
In apps/quantdrive/backend/services/folder.service.ts: ensure createFolder, getFolder, listFolders, renameFolder, moveFolder, deleteFolder exist.
In apps/quantdrive/backend/services/share.service.ts: ensure shareFile, getShares, revokeShare, getSharedWithMe exist with permission levels (view, edit, admin).
In apps/quantdrive/backend/services/version.service.ts: ensure getVersions, uploadVersion, restoreVersion, deleteVersion exist.
In apps/quantdrive/backend/services/storage-quota.service.ts: ensure getUsage, checkQuota, getQuotaLimit exist.
In apps/quantcalendar/backend/services/event.service.ts: ensure createEvent, getEvent, updateEvent, deleteEvent, listEvents, listEventsInRange exist.
In apps/quantcalendar/backend/services/recurring.service.ts: ensure createRecurring, expandOccurrences, updateSingle, updateAll exist.
In apps/quantcalendar/backend/services/availability.service.ts: ensure getAvailability, findFreeSlots, checkConflicts exist.
In apps/quantcalendar/backend/services/booking-link.service.ts: ensure createLink, getLink, bookSlot, listBookings exist.
In apps/quantmeet/backend/services/room.service.ts: ensure createRoom, joinRoom, leaveRoom, getRoom, listRooms, endMeeting exist.
In apps/quantmeet/backend/services/transcript.service.ts: ensure startTranscription, addSegment, getTranscript, getFullTranscript exist.
In apps/quantmeet/backend/services/action-items.service.ts: ensure extractActionItems, getActionItems, completeActionItem exist.
Add/update tests in apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/, apps/quantcalendar/backend/__tests__/, apps/quantmeet/backend/__tests__/.
Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint to verify all gates pass
acceptance_criteria: QuantDrive file/folder/share/version/quota services have complete CRUD with tests
QuantCalendar event/recurring/availability/booking services have complete CRUD with tests
QuantMeet room/transcript/summary/action-items services have complete CRUD with tests
findings: All methods from the launch gate requirements were already partially implemented. Added: getFile, listFiles, moveFile, copyFile (file.service), getShares, getSharedWithMe (share.service), deleteVersion (version.service), getQuotaLimit (storage-quota.service), listEventsInRange (event.service), createRecurring, expandOccurrences, updateSingle, updateAll (recurring.service), findFreeSlots, checkConflicts (availability.service), listBookings (booking-link.service), listRooms, endMeeting (room.service), startTranscription, addSegment, getFullTranscript (transcript.service), getSummary (summary.service), getActionItems, completeActionItem (action-items.service). The RecurringService was refactored to optionally accept a PrismaClient constructor param for new persistence methods while maintaining backward compat with no-arg construction for pure computation tests.
